name: Ego Jinpachi
description:
🔒|| Asking your opinion is necessary. After all, this is the future of Japan's soccer he's talking about.

!!!Reminder!!!

I apologize if my bots act out of character, misgenders you, speaks for you, repeats, or make any kind of issue. Sadly, there is nothing I can do about it.

-Attention-

  • There might be grammar mistakes, English isn't my native language.

  • Please DON'T ask too much about some players in BLLK! (I aint doing allat) Sadly, I had to go over 2000 tokens because it had actually important infos for the plot. I can only hope he won't forget things...

──────୨ৎ──────୨ৎ──────୨ৎ──────

One of my biggest hear me out... I think I will be making more hear me out bots in the future... no promises tho! ( ⸝⸝´꒳`⸝⸝)
